testcase.name: test_profit_loss

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('revenue' in {'cogs': 5683.29, 'expense_categories': [{'amount': 4600, 'category': 'Warehouse Rent'}, {'amount': 4200, 'category': 'Cold Storage'}, {'amount': 4090, 'category': 'Utilities'}, {'amount': 4050, 'category': 'Shipping & Freight'}, {'amount': 3400, 'category': 'Insurance'}, {'amount': 2880, 'category': 'Equipment Maintenance'}, ...], 'gross_margin': 38.0, 'gross_profit': 3483.31, ...} or 'income' in {'cogs': 5683.29, 'expense_categories': [{'amount': 4600, 'category': 'Warehouse Rent'}, {'amount': 4200, 'category': 'Cold Storage'}, {'amount': 4090, 'category': 'Utilities'}, {'amount': 4050, 'category': 'Shipping & Freight'}, {'amount': 3400, 'category': 'Insurance'}, {'amount': 2880, 'category': 'Equipment Maintenance'}, ...], 'gross_margin': 38.0, 'gross_profit': 3483.31, ...} or 'total_revenue' in {'cogs': 5683.29, 'expense_categories': [{'amount': 4600, 'category': 'Warehouse Rent'}, {'amount': 4200, 'category': 'Cold Storage'}, {'amount': 4090, 'category': 'Utilities'}, {'amount': 4050, 'category': 'Shipping & Freight'}, {'amount': 3400, 'category': 'Insurance'}, {'amount': 2880, 'category': 'Equipment Maintenance'}, ...], 'gross_margin': 38.0, 'gross_profit': 3483.31, ...} or 'net_income' in {'cogs': 5683.29, 'expense_categories': [{'amount': 4600, 'category': 'Warehouse Rent'}, {'amount': 4200, 'category': 'Cold Storage'}, {'amount': 4090, 'category': 'Utilities'}, {'amount': 4050, 'category': 'Shipping & Freight'}, {'amount': 3400, 'category': 'Insurance'}, {'amount': 2880, 'category': 'Equipment Maintenance'}, ...], 'gross_margin': 38.0, 'gross_profit': 3483.31, ...})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e2e_workflows.py:169: in test_profit_loss assert "revenue" in d or "income" in d or "total_revenue" in d or "net_income" in d E AssertionError: assert ('revenue' in {'cogs': 5683.29, 'expense_categories': [{'amount': 4600, 'category': 'Warehouse Rent'}, {'amount': 4200, 'category': 'Cold Storage'}, {'amount': 4090, 'category': 'Utilities'}, {'amount': 4050, 'category': 'Shipping & Freight'}, {'amount': 3400, 'category': 'Insurance'}, {'amount': 2880, 'category': 'Equipment Maintenance'}, ...], 'gross_margin': 38.0, 'gross_profit': 3483.31, ...} or 'income' in {'cogs': 5683.29, 'expense_categories': [{'amount': 4600, 'category': 'Warehouse Rent'}, {'amount': 4200, 'category': 'Cold Storage'}, {'amount': 4090, 'category': 'Utilities'}, {'amount': 4050, 'category': 'Shipping & Freight'}, {'amount': 3400, 'category': 'Insurance'}, {'amount': 2880, 'category': 'Equipment Maintenance'}, ...], 'gross_margin': 38.0, 'gross_profit': 3483.31, ...} or 'total_revenue' in {'cogs': 5683.29, 'expense_categories': [{'amount': 4600, 'category': 'Warehouse Rent'}, {'amount': 4200, 'category': 'Cold Storage'}, {'amount': 4090, 'category': 'Utilities'}, {'amount': 4050, 'category': 'Shipping & Freight'}, {'amount': 3400, 'category': 'Insurance'}, {'amount': 2880, 'category': 'Equipment Maintenance'}, ...], 'gross_margin': 38.0, 'gross_profit': 3483.31, ...} or 'net_income' in {'cogs': 5683.29, 'expense_categories': [{'amount': 4600, 'category': 'Warehouse Rent'}, {'amount': 4200, 'category': 'Cold Storage'}, {'amount': 4090, 'category': 'Utilities'}, {'amount': 4050, 'category': 'Shipping & Freight'}, {'amount': 3400, 'category': 'Insurance'}, {'amount': 2880, 'category': 'Equipment Maintenance'}, ...], 'gross_margin': 38.0, 'gross_profit': 3483.31, ...})
